basic_details.job_title: NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Project Associate I Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Project Associate I
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi) has released the official Junior Research Fellow and Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 notification under Advertisement No. ANRF/ECRG/2025/001559 on its official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the NIT Delhi JRF and Project Associate I Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with B.E./ B.Tech or M.E./ M.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) with the prescribed eligibility criteria can apply online on or before 31 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available belo

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/M.E. in ECE with first division and valid GATE score (for JRF), B.Tech/B.E. in ECE with first division (for JRF), Four years B.Tech in ECE/CSE with first division (for Project Associate – I)
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M. Tech. or M.E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering with first division/class with specialization in signal processing and communication or in any such related area. B. Tech. or B.E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering with first division. Candidates should have a valid GATE score. Project Associate I: Four years B. Tech. Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Computer Science Engineering with first division/class.

salary_details.pay_scale: RF: ₹ 37,000/- + HRA (with GATE/CSIR UGC NET) or ₹ 30,000/- + HRA (without GATE/CSIR UGC NET). Project Associate: ₹ 37,000/- + HRA (with GATE/CSIR UGC NET) or ₹ 30,000/- + HRA (without GATE/CSIR UGC NET).
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): ₹ 37,000/- + HRA (with GATE/CSIR UGC NET) or ₹ 30,000/- + HRA (without GATE/CSIR UGC NET). Project Associate I: ₹ 37,000/- + HRA (with GATE/CSIR UGC NET) or ₹ 30,000/- + HRA (without GATE/CSIR UGC NET).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M. Tech. or M.E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering with first division/class with specialization in signal processing and communication or in any such related area. B. Tech. or B.E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering with first division. Candidates should have a valid GATE score. Project Associate I: Four years B. Tech. Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Computer Science Engineering with first division/class.

content_sections.heading: NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): ₹ 37,000/- + HRA (with GATE/CSIR UGC NET) or ₹ 30,000/- + HRA (without GATE/CSIR UGC NET). Project Associate I: ₹ 37,000/- + HRA (with GATE/CSIR UGC NET) or ₹ 30,000/- + HRA (without GATE/CSIR UGC NET).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Project Associate – I posts is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by NIT Delhi for the positions of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Project Associate – I. One vacancy is for JRF and the other is for Project Associate – I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Junior Research Fellow (JRF)?
faq.answer: For the JRF position, candidates need an M. Tech. or M.E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering with first division and a valid GATE score. A B. Tech. or B.E. degree in ECE with first division is also acceptable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for Project Associate – I?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria for Project Associate – I require a four-year B. Tech. Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or Computer Science Engineering with a first division/class.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for both Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Project Associate – I is ₹ 37,000/- + HRA (with GATE/CSIR UGC NET) or ₹ 30,000/- + HRA (without GATE/CSIR UGC NET).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to fill out the application form on the official website or through the provided link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by an interview. Document verification will also be conducted.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of NIT Delhi?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Delhi is located in Delhi, with the pincode 110036.
